haiku:
Warm, gooey treasures,
Caramel swirls kiss chocolate,
Nuts crunch, sweet dreams bloom.
Happy #NationalButterscotchBrownieDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Whirls of fabric spin,
Mismatched dreams in cozy nooks,
A dance of warmth grows.
Happy #NationalLostSockMemorialDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles flicker warm,
Joyful echoes weave through time,
Cake and dreams take flight.
#HappyBirthdayJamesLBrooks from @ClamBakeSanta
